title: Energy cost of a failed OOM job
query_text: My job failed due to OOM. Was I still charged for the energy used, and approximately how much energy was consumed before the failure?

eval_criteria.gold_answer: Yes, energy consumed before the OOM kill is billed. Job 891234 ran for approximately 6 hours and 47 minutes (submitted 2026-02-09T19:00, killed 2026-02-10T01:47 UTC) on node01. At a typical node power draw of ~8 kW, the estimated energy consumption was ~54 kWh. The memory_request_guide.md confirms that jobs are charged for elapsed walltime regardless of exit status.
